rationale: Legacy pecl-mongo connection option bug; no cross-driver spec area, internal option handling issue.
Wrong connection selected when two connections open; legacy pecl-mongo connection routing bug, no specific spec rule.
pcntl extension compatibility request; internal driver interoperability, not a spec conformance issue.
Intermittent query send failure; network/connection error, no specific spec rule violated.
Crash/segfault after copying server definition for auth connections; memory/crash bug, no spec rule violated.
Empty description; adding w=0 support and getlasterror flags is an internal improvement with no clear spec violation.
Mongo::connect() return type regression; PHP API compatibility issue, no cross-driver spec rule.
Segfault when switching databases with wrong credentials; crash bug in auth handling, not a spec rule violation.
64-bit integer query result mismatch on amd64; platform-specific integer encoding bug, no named spec rule.
Aggregation pipeline filtering issue; user error / driver usage question, not a spec conformance bug.
Non-existent host silently falls back to localhost; connection-string area but no specific spec rule about host fallback.
Unused INI setting for ismaster interval; internal configuration bug, not a spec area.
Unused INI setting for ping_interval; internal configuration bug, no spec involvement.
Changing readPreference constants to strings; empty description, API constant change, no clear spec rule violation.
PHP method parameter name prevents mocking; PHP-specific API ergonomics issue, no spec involvement.
MongoClient::RP_* constants had incorrect values after type change; internal constant value bug, no specific spec rule.
Install guide review; documentation issue, no spec conformance.
Changelog documentation update for 1.3; documentation only.
PHP method declaration mismatch for batchInsert parameter types; PHP reflection bug, no spec rule violated.
Document MongoClient::getConnections(); documentation task only.
Changelog ordering issue in documentation; documentation only.
Manual restructuring; documentation only.
Documentation error: update/remove parameter descriptions swapped; documentation bug only.
Document WriteConcerns; documentation task only.
Replace slave language in docs with read preferences terminology; documentation update only.
Document that save() may set _id; documentation improvement only.
slaveOk option not documented; documentation gap only.
Segfault during PHPUnit run in connection callback deregister; crash/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
Segfaults running complex queries in 1.3RC3; crash/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
Segfault on long query conditions; crash/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
Unused INI setting mongo.allow_persistent; internal configuration cleanup, no spec involvement.
Remove undocumented mongo.no_id INI option; internal configuration cleanup, no spec involvement.
cursor->info() no longer returns pre-execution data; PHP API regression, no spec rule defines this cursor metadata API.
Return value of unsafe writes changed from bool to null in 1.3; documentation/behavioral note, PHP API change not a spec rule.
Mongo->connected property always true with replicaSet; internal connection state flag bug, no specific spec rule.
Write concern wtimeout throws MongoCursorException instead of required MongoCursorTimeoutException; wrong exception type per spec.
Empty database name in URI parsed as empty string; connection-string parsing improvement, no specific named spec rule.
Segfault when no candidate servers found for tag-based read preference; crash/memory bug, not a spec rule violation.
MongoGridFS::get() only accepts MongoId; API usability restriction, no spec rule about GridFS get() argument types.
Build failure on OSX due to missing _strndup symbol; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Segfault passing 'db' option to MongoClient constructor; crash/memory bug in option parsing.
BSON MinKey (type 0xff) not deserialized correctly on 32-bit; BSON spec type support violated on that platform.
MongoGridFS::get() accepts only MongoId not string; API usability gap, no GridFS spec rule about argument type.
GridFS storeFile fails without safe option due to internal safe-mode use; implementation bug, no specific GridFS spec rule.
readPreferenceTags only accepts string, not array for multiple tagsets; PHP API limitation, no specific spec rule about PHP binding.
Username/password in $options array not supported; missing feature in PHP binding, no specific spec rule about options array.
Authenticated connections not filtered properly for different db/user combos on same replica set; internal auth connection management bug.
MongoDB::authenticate() stopped authenticating; regression in legacy auth method, thin description.
findAndModify throws exception on Windows but not Linux; platform-specific bug, no spec rule violated.
1.3.x driver fails against old MongoDB 1.6.3 due to maxBsonSize=0; server version compatibility issue, not a spec rule violation.
